payload.answer: The proposed memory write should not be committed as-is. For an 8000-word transcript, prefer a repair path that splits the content into smaller, scoped memory candidates or converts it into a concise summary with separable facts.
citations: Input: LLM proposal: one conversation_summary card containing an entire 8000 word transcript.
repair_options: Split the transcript into multiple smaller, topic-scoped summary candidates rather than one card.
Reduce the proposal to a concise high-level conversation summary only, omitting detailed transcript content.
Keep the transcript out of durable memory and store only user-confirmed takeaways, if any.
If needed, generate separate additive memory candidates for distinct stable facts instead of one merged summary.
